title: biscutella laevigata subsp. australis
intro: Biscutella laevigata subsp. australis, also known as Austral Biscutella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties due to the presence of glucosinolates, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Biscutella laevigata subsp. australis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Biscutella laevigata subsp. australis can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
